generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. NO BORDERS. FULL BLEED IMAGE. WIDE FIELD OF VIEW. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: A Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs, back to the viewer, looking out over the sea from a ridge. He stands between EXACTLY THREE wooden wands that are planted firmly in the ground close together in a narrow arrangement. All three wands must be fully visible and centered. Slender build, sharp facial structure, white ear spots, forehead stripes. High-fidelity biological markers.
generation.narrative: A leopard cat stands with three wands, watching the expansion of its territory and the departure of its progeny toward the horizon. It represents the successful wait and the results of earlier planning.

meanings.upright: Progress, expansion, looking toward the long-term, and successful growth of the population range.
meanings.reversed: Disrupted expansion, short-sightedness, or a failure to watch the horizon for opportunities/threats.

ecology.mapping_note: Three of Wands becomes the successful expansion of the species into restored corridors, where the 'ships on the horizon' are leopard cats moving into new safe-zones.

website.excerpt: Standing on a headland, the leopard cat watches the fruits of its labor—the expansion of its species towards the horizon.
website.seo_description: Three of Wands reimagined as leopard cat species expansion and successful dispersal.

meaning.zh: 進展、擴張、放眼長遠的未來，以及族群領域的成功成長。
meaning.en: Progress, expansion, looking toward the long-term, and successful growth of the population range.
